title: Winter activities (sledding down hills, sleigh ride)
description: Sledding down hills. Taking a six-horse sleigh to Kennedy Ford Grange from Harvard.

title: Troubles at Princeton (robbery, lost buggy top, lost sleigh tongue)
description: Troubles at Princeton: Carl's sleigh is robbed; his buggy top is cut off by a wire across the road. Losing a sleigh tongue. Carl preferred team to horseback.

title: Early cars; Carl's family is separated
description: Some early cars. A Case car runs on cream separator oil. Carl's family separated.

title: Carl tangles with a crazy man
description: Carl tangles with a crazy man.

title: Carl's work maintaining the railroad section; railroad strike
description: Carl's work maintaining the railroad section. A bit about the railroad strike.

title: Carl switches to woods work
description: Carl switches to woods work. He works all different jobs, depending on where he is needed. Drays, drop skids, headblocks, bunkloads, corner binds and bumper logs.
